creator: AaronJOlson
changes: Normalized scale and centered model for web use

Segmented the mesh into 14 selectable major muscle-group objects (Chest, Shoulders, Biceps, Triceps, Forearms, Lats, Upper Back, Lower Back, Traps, Core, Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes, Calves) via anatomical coordinate regions
Filled each group with a soft distinct tint (vertex colors), darkened in the cavity grooves, so muscle groups read as a clean muscle map
Tagged each group object with a `muscle_group` glTF extra for in-app tap/highlight
